name: document-intelligence-workbench
description: Multi-scenario document analysis workbench on Azure AI Document Intelligence

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w apps/server" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/web && npm run typecheck -w apps/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w apps/server && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
